---
name: Bug Report
about: Something isn't working correctly
title: "[BUG] "
labels: ["bug"]
assignees: []

---

## 🐛 Bug Description
A clear description of what the bug is.

## 🔄 Steps to Reproduce
1. Run `diskcomp ...`
2. Select option '...'
3. See error

## ✅ Expected Behavior
What you expected to happen.

## ❌ Actual Behavior  
What actually happened (include error messages).

## 💻 Environment
- **OS**: (macOS 14.1, Ubuntu 22.04, Windows 11, etc.)
- **diskcomp version**: (run `pip show diskcomp` or check PyPI)
- **Python version**: (run `python --version`)
- **Install method**: (pip, pipx, binary download, etc.)

## 📁 Drive Information (if relevant)
- **Filesystem types**: (APFS, ext4, NTFS, etc.)
- **Drive sizes**: (approximate)
- **Number of files**: (approximate)

## 🔍 Additional Context
- Log output (if any)
- Screenshots (if helpful)
- Whether this worked before in an earlier version
